_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: reacted with a single major 55 kDa polypeptide in the human erythrocyte ghosts and a minor ~32 kDa band...the most intense p55 signal was detected in the human neutrophils
details: Detected a single major 55 kDa polypeptide in human erythrocyte ghosts and a minor ~32 kDa band (degradation product), with relatively weak staining in erythrocytes but most intense signal in human neutrophils
